summary: Tested Factory Warehouse Stock feature in Stock Dashboard. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Factory Warehouse Stock card displays correctly with 90 crates total, 'Wh. Stock' column visible in SKU table, per-warehouse breakdown shows 'Default master' with 90 crates of 'Nyla - 660 ml / Sparkling'.
seed_data_creation: Used existing factory warehouse stock (90 crates of 'Nyla - 660 ml / Sparkling' in 'Default master' warehouse) for distributor 'Surya 1'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Factory Warehouse Stock feature in Stock Dashboard is fully implemented and working. Frontend: StockDashboardTab.jsx displays Factory Warehouse Stock card (data-testid='factory-warehouse-stock-card') when factory_warehouse_stock > 0, shows 'Wh. Stock' column in SKU table, and footer totals include factory warehouse stock. Test distributor 'Surya 1' (ID: b8876367-df64-4c55-a382-d5eb3b4b2380) has 90 crates in 'Default master' factory warehouse.
